headline: Sherwin-Williams (SHW) Q4 2024 Earnings Transcript
summary: Sherwin-Williams delivered strong fourth quarter results that concluded a record year for the company.  Consolidated sales in the fourth quarter increased by a low single-digit percentage, and gross margin improved slightly over a very strong level a year ago.  In terms of our segments in the fourth quarter, paint stores group sales increased in the range we expected, led by high single-digit growth in residential repaint and protective and marine.
